title: 4 inch Wire Hook [10 Pack] Model 113 for Tool Wall Organization of Combination Wrenchs, Adjustable Wrenchs, Hammers, Paint Brushes, Merchandise, and More | Compatible with Wall Control
features: VERSATILE - Bracket for holding mechandise, wrenchs, paint brushes, putty knives, hammers, mallets, tape rolls, wire spools, garden tools, and more.

SECURE - All TROPEK brackets easily snap into the panel and remain securely in-place during storage and use. All TROPEK brackets can be released by simply pressing the lever on the bottom of the bracket and are compatible with TROPEK or Wall Control panels.

EXPANDABLE - Individual TROPEK brackets can be attached adjacent to each other, allowing you to organize your collection of tools based on your unique quantity and needs. Unlike other products that offer only a 6-position or 8-position bracket, additional TROPEK brackets can be easily added or removed as your collection grows or changes.

EFFICIENT - The TROPEK wall organization system allows you to store tools in a high-density manner and make the most use of precious wall space. Competitors often show relatively few tools hung on a large wall, which is inefficient for small spaces and costly.
VISIBLE - The TROPEK wall organization system allows for your most common tools to be quickly and easily viewed at once, eliminating wasted time opening and digging through tool box drawers.
description: The versatile 113 bracket from TROPEK is designed to hold any item with a 1/4 inch, or larger, hole. Perfect for holding a collection of combination wrenchs, adjustable wrenchs, paint brushs, scrapers, putty knives, tape rolls, wire spools, garden tools, and more. Any piece of merchandise with a 1/4 inch hang-hole can be held by bracket. Two bracket can be installed in adjecent panel slots to hold a hammer, mallet, rachet, or scissors. TROPEK is a trademark of Tasso Research LLC. Wall Control is a registered trademark of Wall Control, Inc. Panel sold separately. Tools not included. Not compatible with 1/4" pegboard.
